## Describe the Bug
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Upload file '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots or paste log output.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 124]
- SkyTraq version: [e.g. 1.2.0]
- Deployment: [Docker / local dev]

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
